name: PSD To UGUI
summary: Parse Photoshop PSD files for Unity UI workflows and UGUI prefab conversion.

summaryI18n.zh: 解析 Photoshop PSD，用于 Unity UI 工作流和 UGUI Prefab 转换。
summaryI18n.en: Parse Photoshop PSD files for Unity UI workflows and UGUI prefab conversion.

author: aYiYiiii
description: PSD To UGUI provides a Locus Skill for inspecting PSD layer trees, exporting flattened previews or visible layers/groups as PNG files, generating layout manifests, and guiding Unity UGUI prefab conversion workflows.

descriptionI18n.zh: PSD To UGUI 提供一个 Locus Skill，可检查 PSD 图层树，导出合成预览或可见图层/组 PNG，生成布局清单，并辅助 Unity UGUI Prefab 转换流程。
descriptionI18n.en: PSD To UGUI provides a Locus Skill for inspecting PSD layer trees, exporting flattened previews or visible layers/groups as PNG files, generating layout manifests, and guiding Unity UGUI prefab conversion workflows.
